productDisplayName: FIFA Mens 1990 World Cup Black T-shirt
description: 1. 100% Cotton(180 gsm)2. Crew Neck half sleeves t-shirt"CIAO", which means an Italian greeting, was featured as fifa's offcial mascot in the 1990 World Cup. It is a stick figure player with a football head and an Italian Tricolor body.Cool, casual and comfy, t-shirts are perhaps the best thing invented in clothing. Slipping into a t-shirt and getting started is always a breeze. It's the perennial all-occasion outfit that remains a favourite with one and all. Parties, get-togethers, Friday dressing or simply a walk in the park, t-shirts are an ideal Fit for any occasion. The appeal of T-shirts only gets more as they are available in lots of colours, various fits and sizes. So all it takes  is the desire to wear a T-shirt and one would be spoilt for choice pretty soon. Stuff up the wardrobe or stack up your room with T-shirts that suit your style and taste. Go on and join the ever growing fan club for T-shirts.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in T-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
